name: Louisiana Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp by removing their shells and vein, or leave the shells on for serving.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add beer, salt, thyme, ground hot red pepper, black pepper, oregano, and crushed red pepper flakes to the saucepan. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat and cover the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Gently add the shrimp to the simmering liquid and cover. Simmer for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until the shrimp are tender. Do not drain excess liquid.
6. Serve the peppery shrimp, cooked in beer broth, hot or chilled with bread for soaking up the broth. Garnish with lemon wedges.
The shrimp can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated, covered, then served chilled.
